parameters.query:
SELECT 
  cp.id,
  cp.opportunity,
  cp.agency,
  cp.contract_value,
  cp.plan_data->>'stage' as stage,
  cp.plan_data->>'priority' as priority,
  cp.plan_data->>'pwin' as pwin,
  cp.plan_data->'proposal_status'->>'current_phase' as current_phase,
  cp.plan_data->'proposal_status'->>'compliance_matrix' as compliance,
  cp.plan_data->'proposal_status'->'critical_fixes_before_submit' as critical_fixes,
  cp.plan_data->'risks' as risks,
  cp.plan_data->>'incumbent' as incumbent,
  cp.plan_data->'win_strategy'->>'primary_theme' as win_theme
FROM gda_capture_plans cp
WHERE cp.plan_data->>'stage' IN ('Proposal', 'Post-Submittal', 'Qualify')
ORDER BY cp.contract_value DESC NULLS LAST
